title: Assistant Superintendent, Early Education & Family Engagement
notes: Large Dallas-area district (~27,000 students). Ramirez leads Early Education & Family Engagement -- a perfect ECE persona match (HB 3 full-day Pre-K aligned). Public site uses contact forms rather than displaying full emails; address inferred from district [first-initial][last]@gpisd.org pattern confirmed via ZoomInfo. Verify via Apollo. Secondary contact: Vicki Bridges, Executive Director of Secondary Schools.

title: Senior Director, Head Start
notes: FLAG: HCDE is NOT a Texas ISD -- it is one of two remaining county departments of education (regional service agency serving the Houston/Harris County area). Operates 17 Head Start centers directly, but does not adopt curriculum for local ISDs. Treat as a service agency, not a district. Peacock is the closest ECE-persona match (oversees HCDE Head Start). Superintendent is James Colbert Jr. Email format inferred from agency [first-initial][last]@hcde-texas.org pattern -- verify via Apollo. May not be appropriate for standard Brightwheel ISD outreach.

title: Superintendent

title: Director of Student Support & Academics
notes: This is the Amarillo/Potter County HPISD (NOT the Dallas hpisd.org HPISD already enriched in batch 2). ~830 students. Barnett oversees curriculum/academics; closest ECE-persona match. Superintendent: Jimmy Hannon. District is building a new PK-2 campus at Buffalo Highlands opening 2027 -- strong Pre-K growth/buying signal.
